description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a matte dark green and black finish, featuring a long, heavy barrel and a precision scope mounted on top. The stock is a thumbhole design, providing ergonomic support for the shooter, and the body appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and polymer materials. The rifle includes a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The barrel is notably extended, suggesting high accuracy and range, and the muzzle does not appear to have any additional device attached. The scope is a large, tubular optical sight, likely for long-range targeting. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for tactical or law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a long barrel, thumbhole stock, and mounted scope, finished in dark green and black. It features a detachable box magazine and a sleek, tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the scope aligned above the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, thumbhole stock, scope, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's thumbhole design and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's length, stock, and scope from the other side.
